originalTitle: Live Dev - PufferLib is Fixing Reinforcement Learning
title: Porting Neural MMO 3 to New C Binding API and Debugging PufferLib Port
summary: Debugged a broken PufferLib port caused by a leftover breakpoint, then ported neural MMO 3 to the new C binding API. The new binding system eliminates Cython dependencies, enables transparent debugging with GDB, and shows performance improvements.
